findings.evidence: Grep hits show the special theorem at `DifferentialSquareSupport.lean:116` and the general theorem with the same two one-step-support reasoning at `DifferentialSquareSupport.lean:148`.
findings.fix: Prove `fullyBlockedDifferential_sq_support_subset_biUnion` first, then derive the single-generator support theorem by specializing to `Finsupp.single x 1` and simplifying its support/biUnion; derive the single zero/cardinality corollaries from that.
findings.issue: `fullyBlockedDifferential_sq_single_support_subset` duplicates the same two-step support argument later proved in the more general `fullyBlockedDifferential_sq_support_subset_biUnion` for arbitrary chains.

summary: The new support API includes useful two-step bounds, but it proves generator-level special cases independently of the chain-level theorem instead of deriving them from the natural general statement.
